properties.title: China Dimensions Data Collection: Bibliography of Chinese Administrative Geography
properties.description: The Bibliography of Chinese Administrative Geography is a historical collection of bibliographic information on 75 published books describing the administrative geography of China. The information resides in a searchable database and includes title, author/editor, subject, spatial (national, provincial, local) and temporal coverage, publisher, description, and language, as well as location of the reference, for works published during the 1949-1994 period. This data set is produced in collaboration with the University of Washington as part of the China in Time and Space (CITAS) project, Universities Service Center at the Chinese University of Hong Kong, and the Center for International Earth Science Information Network (CIESIN).
properties.purpose: To provide a database of works pertaining to the administrative geography of China, searchable by location, time, and subject matter.
properties.authors: China in Time and Space - CITAS - University of Washington, and Center for International Earth Science Information Network - CIESIN
properties.publishers: NASA Socioeconomic Data and Applications Center (SEDAC)
properties.citation: China in Time and Space - CITAS - University of Washington, and Center for International Earth Science Information Network - CIESIN. 1997. China Dimensions Data Collection: Bibliography of Chinese Administrative Geography. Saginaw, MI: NASA Socioeconomic Data and Applications Center (SEDAC). https://doi.org/10.7927/H4MK69T5. Accessed [DAY MONTH YEAR].
keywords: EARTH SCIENCE > HUMAN DIMENSIONS > BOUNDARIES > ADMINISTRATIVE DIVISIONS
